Alerts

  1. Risk=Medium, Confidence=High (8)

    1. https://www.google-analytics.com (1)

      1. Session ID in URL Rewrite (1)
        1. POST https://www.google-analytics.com/g/collect?v=2&tid=G-42LX6H5X8Y&gtm=45je6330h2v871035212z86833490za20gzb6833490zd6833490&_p=1772589931435&gcd=13l3l3l3l1l1&npa=0&dma=0&cid=1558534109.1772589935&ul=en-us&sr=1920x1080&frm=0&pscdl=noapi&_s=1&tag_exp=102015665~103116026~103200004~115616986~115938466~115938468~116024733~117484252&sid=1772589934&sct=1&seg=0&dl=https%3A%2F%2Fsoon-tech.on.spiceworks.com%2Fportal%2F&dt=Soon-Tech%20Help%20Desk&uid=&en=page_view&_fv=1&_nsi=1&_ss=1&up.chd_user_id=&up.account_id=&up.chd_end_user_id=&up.chd_end_user_org_id=&up.chd_end_user_portal_auth_type=1&tfd=4489
          Alert tags
          • CWE-598
          • OWASP_2021_A01
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • WSTG-v42-SESS-04
          • OWASP_2017_A03
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          URL rewrite is used to track user session ID. The session ID may be disclosed via cross-site referer header. In addition, the session ID might be stored in browser history or server logs.
          Request
          Request line and header section (1051 bytes) 
          POST https://www.google-analytics.com/g/collect?v=2&tid=G-42LX6H5X8Y&gtm=45je6330h2v871035212z86833490za20gzb6833490zd6833490&_p=1772589931435&gcd=13l3l3l3l1l1&npa=0&dma=0&cid=1558534109.1772589935&ul=en-us&sr=1920x1080&frm=0&pscdl=noapi&_s=1&tag_exp=102015665~103116026~103200004~115616986~115938466~115938468~116024733~117484252&sid=1772589934&sct=1&seg=0&dl=https%3A%2F%2Fsoon-tech.on.spiceworks.com%2Fportal%2F&dt=Soon-Tech%20Help%20Desk&uid=&en=page_view&_fv=1&_nsi=1&_ss=1&up.chd_user_id=&up.account_id=&up.chd_end_user_id=&up.chd_end_user_org_id=&up.chd_end_user_portal_auth_type=1&tfd=4489 HTTP/1.1

          Solution

          For secure content, put session ID in a cookie. To be even more secure consider using a combination of cookie and URL rewrite.

    2. https://www.google.com (1)

      1. CSP: script-src unsafe-eval (1)
        1. GET https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api2/anchor?ar=1&k=6LdKJK8ZAAAAAPouGI6FOJepbMiheg-nAz1OF1Tb&co=aHR0cHM6Ly9zb29uLXRlY2gub24uc3BpY2V3b3Jrcy5jb206NDQz&hl=en&v=AWtrSI7lAmTAfV1rzWqEqz54&size=invisible&anchor-ms=20000&execute-ms=30000&cb=yp41a7a5l3m1
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          Content Security Policy (CSP) is an added layer of security that helps to detect and mitigate certain types of attacks. Including (but not limited to) Cross Site Scripting (XSS), and data injection attacks. These attacks are used for everything from data theft to site defacement or distribution of malware. CSP provides a set of standard HTTP headers that allow website owners to declare approved sources of content that browsers should be allowed to load on that page вҖ” covered types are JavaScript, CSS, HTML frames, fonts, images and embeddable objects such as Java applets, ActiveX, audio and video files.
          Other info

          script-src includes unsafe-eval.
          Request
          Request line and header section (710 bytes) 
          GET https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api2/anchor?ar=1&k=6LdKJK8ZAAAAAPouGI6FOJepbMiheg-nAz1OF1Tb&co=aHR0cHM6Ly9zb29uLXRlY2gub24uc3BpY2V3b3Jrcy5jb206NDQz&hl=en&v=AWtrSI7lAmTAfV1rzWqEqz54&size=invisible&anchor-ms=20000&execute-ms=30000&cb=yp41a7a5l3m1 HTTP/1.1

          Parameter 
          Content-Security-Policy
          Evidence 
          script-src 'nonce-BcGGsXIgbTngbBa0P2vrxA' 'unsafe-inline' 'strict-dynamic' https: http: 'unsafe-eval';object-src 'none';base-uri 'self';report-uri https://csp.withgoogle.com/csp/recaptcha/1
          Solution

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is properly configured to set the Content-Security-Policy header.

    3. https://soon-tech.on.spiceworks.com (4)

      1. CSP: Failure to Define Directive with No Fallback (1)
        1. GET https://soon-tech.on.spiceworks.com/portal
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          The Content Security Policy fails to define one of the directives that has no fallback. Missing/excluding them is the same as allowing anything.
          Other info

          The directive(s): frame-ancestors, form-action is/are among the directives that do not fallback to default-src.
          Request
          Request line and header section (466 bytes) 
          GET https://soon-tech.on.spiceworks.com/portal HTTP/1.1
host: soon-tech.on.spiceworks.com
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:148.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/148.0
Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9
Connection: keep-alive
Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1
Sec-Fetch-Dest: document
Sec-Fetch-Mode: navigate
Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site
Sec-Fetch-User: ?1
Priority: u=0, i
          Request body (0 bytes)
          Response
          Status line and header section (2534 bytes) 
          HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Date: Wed, 04 Mar 2026 02:05:30 GMT
Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8
Connection: keep-alive
CF-RAY: 9d6d50f8a8f47daf-YVR
x-frame-options: ALLOW-FROM *
x-xss-protection: 0
x-content-type-options: nosniff
x-permitted-cross-domain-policies: none
referrer-policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
Cache-Control: no-store

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="portal">
  <head>
    <title>Soon-Tech Help Desk</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href=https://edge.spiceworksstatic.com/service.tron/assets/favicon-845dec177fcd19cebf907924a1da01792dae2115fe1181fb96a6c94e260d338e.ico>

    <meta name="csrf-param" content="authenticity_token" />
<meta name="csrf-token" content="K8lB4Fg9P5EujAf4ubBMY1NAZmohya66oz7rDYqVFuzM4NNKbm2GoCUKjyfKoUZAeas5sBX2O7HBFoIDbjaHrw" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="revision" content="45d168dc" />
    <!-- TODO: Remove once pages have been re-indexed and robots.txt file is added back -->
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex">

    <!-- Data Layer -->
<script>
  var userId = '';
  var chdUserId = '';
  var accountId = '';
  var currentEndUserId = '';
  var currentEndUserOrganizationId = '';
  var currentEndUserPortalAuthType = '';

  function getPortalAuthType() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;

    if (currentPath.startsWith('/portal')) {
      if (currentPath.includes('/portal/registrations')) {
        return '2'; // email authentication
      }
      if (!currentEndUserId) {
        return '1'; // guest mode (no authentication)
      }

      // will be either 2 for email authentication or 3 for active directory authentication
      return currentEndUserPortalAuthType;
    }
    // We're not in the Portal app
    else {
      return '';
    }
  }

  function initializeDataLayer() {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      'user_id': userId,
      'chd_user_id': chdUserId,
      'account_id': accountId,
      'chd_end_user_id': currentEndUserId,
      'chd_end_user_portal_auth_type': getPortalAuthType(),
      'chd_end_user_organization_id': currentEndUserOrganizationId,
    });
  }

  initializeDataLayer();
</script>
<!-- End Data Layer -->

<!-- Google Tag Manager -->

  m=s.getElementsByTagName(o)[0];a.async=1;a.src=g;m.parentNode.insertBefore(a,m)
  })(window,document,'script','//www.google-analytics.com/analytics.js','ga');

  ga('create', 'UA-314222-33', 'auto', {'allowLinker': true});
  // current_user is undefined for the portal and will not send pageviews.
  // Ember and Vue use a different method for sending GA stats. Check out stats.js
</script>

          Parameter 
          content-security-policy
          Solution

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is properly configured to set the Content-Security-Policy header.
      2. CSP: Wildcard Directive (1)
        1. GET https://soon-tech.on.spiceworks.com/portal
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          Content Security Policy (CSP) is an added layer of security that helps to detect and mitigate certain types of attacks. Including (but not limited to) Cross Site Scripting (XSS), and data injection attacks. These attacks are used for everything from data theft to site defacement or distribution of malware. CSP provides a set of standard HTTP headers that allow website owners to declare approved sources of content that browsers should be allowed to load on that page вҖ” covered types are JavaScript, CSS, HTML frames, fonts, images and embeddable objects such as Java applets, ActiveX, audio and video files.
          Other info

          The following directives either allow wildcard sources (or ancestors), are not defined, or are overly broadly defined:

          script-src, style-src, img-src, connect-src, frame-src, font-src, media-src, object-src, manifest-src, worker-src

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="portal">
  <head>
    <title>Soon-Tech Help Desk</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href=https://edge.spiceworksstatic.com/service.tron/assets/favicon-845dec177fcd19cebf907924a1da01792dae2115fe1181fb96a6c94e260d338e.ico>

    <!-- Data Layer -->
<script>
  var userId = '';
  var chdUserId = '';
  var accountId = '';
  var currentEndUserId = '';
  var currentEndUserOrganizationId = '';
  var currentEndUserPortalAuthType = '';

  function getPortalAuthType() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;

    if (currentPath.startsWith('/portal')) {
      if (currentPath.includes('/portal/registrations')) {
        return '2'; // email authentication
      }
      if (!currentEndUserId) {
        return '1'; // guest mode (no authentication)
      }

      // will be either 2 for email authentication or 3 for active directory authentication
      return currentEndUserPortalAuthType;
    }
    // We're not in the Portal app
    else {
      return '';
    }
  }

  function initializeDataLayer() {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      'user_id': userId,
      'chd_user_id': chdUserId,
      'account_id': accountId,
      'chd_end_user_id': currentEndUserId,
      'chd_end_user_portal_auth_type': getPortalAuthType(),
      'chd_end_user_organization_id': currentEndUserOrganizationId,
    });
  }

  initializeDataLayer();
</script>
<!-- End Data Layer -->

          Parameter 
          content-security-policy
          Solution

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is properly configured to set the Content-Security-Policy header.
      3. CSP: script-src unsafe-inline (1)
        1. GET https://soon-tech.on.spiceworks.com/portal
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          Content Security Policy (CSP) is an added layer of security that helps to detect and mitigate certain types of attacks. Including (but not limited to) Cross Site Scripting (XSS), and data injection attacks. These attacks are used for everything from data theft to site defacement or distribution of malware. CSP provides a set of standard HTTP headers that allow website owners to declare approved sources of content that browsers should be allowed to load on that page вҖ” covered types are JavaScript, CSS, HTML frames, fonts, images and embeddable objects such as Java applets, ActiveX, audio and video files.
          Other info

          script-src includes unsafe-inline.

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="portal">
  <head>
    <title>Soon-Tech Help Desk</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href=https://edge.spiceworksstatic.com/service.tron/assets/favicon-845dec177fcd19cebf907924a1da01792dae2115fe1181fb96a6c94e260d338e.ico>

    <meta name="csrf-param" content="authenticity_token" />
<meta name="csrf-token" content="K8lB4Fg9P5EujAf4ubBMY1NAZmohya66oz7rDYqVFuzM4NNKbm2GoCUKjyfKoUZAeas5sBX2O7HBFoIDbjaHrw" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="revision" content="45d168dc" />
    <!-- TODO: Remove once pages have been re-indexed and robots.txt file is added back -->
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex">

    <!-- Data Layer -->
<script>
  var userId = '';
  var chdUserId = '';
  var accountId = '';
  var currentEndUserId = '';
  var currentEndUserOrganizationId = '';
  var currentEndUserPortalAuthType = '';

  function getPortalAuthType() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;

    if (currentPath.startsWith('/portal')) {
      if (currentPath.includes('/portal/registrations')) {
        return '2'; // email authentication
      }
      if (!currentEndUserId) {
        return '1'; // guest mode (no authentication)
      }

      // will be either 2 for email authentication or 3 for active directory authentication
      return currentEndUserPortalAuthType;
    }
    // We're not in the Portal app
    else {
      return '';
    }
  }

  function initializeDataLayer() {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      'user_id': userId,
      'chd_user_id': chdUserId,
      'account_id': accountId,
      'chd_end_user_id': currentEndUserId,
      'chd_end_user_portal_auth_type': getPortalAuthType(),
      'chd_end_user_organization_id': currentEndUserOrganizationId,
    });
  }

  initializeDataLayer();
</script>
<!-- End Data Layer -->

          Parameter 
          content-security-policy
          Solution

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is properly configured to set the Content-Security-Policy header.
      4. CSP: style-src unsafe-inline (1)
        1. GET https://soon-tech.on.spiceworks.com/portal
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =

          Alert description

          Content Security Policy (CSP) is an added layer of security that helps to detect and mitigate certain types of attacks. Including (but not limited to) Cross Site Scripting (XSS), and data injection attacks. These attacks are used for everything from data theft to site defacement or distribution of malware. CSP provides a set of standard HTTP headers that allow website owners to declare approved sources of content that browsers should be allowed to load on that page вҖ” covered types are JavaScript, CSS, HTML frames, fonts, images and embeddable objects such as Java applets, ActiveX, audio and video files.

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="portal">
  <head>
    <title>Soon-Tech Help Desk</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href=https://edge.spiceworksstatic.com/service.tron/assets/favicon-845dec177fcd19cebf907924a1da01792dae2115fe1181fb96a6c94e260d338e.ico>

    <meta name="csrf-param" content="authenticity_token" />
<meta name="csrf-token" content="K8lB4Fg9P5EujAf4ubBMY1NAZmohya66oz7rDYqVFuzM4NNKbm2GoCUKjyfKoUZAeas5sBX2O7HBFoIDbjaHrw" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="revision" content="45d168dc" />
    <!-- TODO: Remove once pages have been re-indexed and robots.txt file is added back -->
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex">

    <!-- Data Layer -->
<script>
  var userId = '';
  var chdUserId = '';
  var accountId = '';
  var currentEndUserId = '';
  var currentEndUserOrganizationId = '';
  var currentEndUserPortalAuthType = '';

  function getPortalAuthType() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;

    if (currentPath.startsWith('/portal')) {
      if (currentPath.includes('/portal/registrations')) {
        return '2'; // email authentication
      }
      if (!currentEndUserId) {
        return '1'; // guest mode (no authentication)
      }

      // will be either 2 for email authentication or 3 for active directory authentication
      return currentEndUserPortalAuthType;
    }
    // We're not in the Portal app
    else {
      return '';
    }
  }

  function initializeDataLayer() {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      'user_id': userId,
      'chd_user_id': chdUserId,
      'account_id': accountId,
      'chd_end_user_id': currentEndUserId,
      'chd_end_user_portal_auth_type': getPortalAuthType(),
      'chd_end_user_organization_id': currentEndUserOrganizationId,
    });
  }

  initializeDataLayer();
</script>
<!-- End Data Layer -->

          Parameter 
          content-security-policy
          Solution

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is properly configured to set the Content-Security-Policy header.

    4. http://192.168.1.153:5173 (2)

      1. Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set (1)
        1. GET http://192.168.1.153:5173/
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          Alert description

          Content Security Policy (CSP) is an added layer of security that helps to detect and mitigate certain types of attacks, including Cross Site Scripting (XSS) and data injection attacks. These attacks are used for everything from data theft to site defacement or distribution of malware. CSP provides a set of standard HTTP headers that allow website owners to declare approved sources of content that browsers should be allowed to load on that page вҖ” covered types are JavaScript, CSS, HTML frames, fonts, images and embeddable objects such as Java applets, ActiveX, audio and video files.

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <script type="module" src="/@vite/client"></script>

    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description" content="SoonTech - Professional IT solutions for homes and businesses in Vancouver, BC">
    <title>SoonTech - IT & Cloud Services | Vancouver, BC</title>

    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Overpass:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

    <!-- Font Awesome -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/5.15.4/css/all.min.css">

    <!-- Main Stylesheet -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">

    <!-- Shared Components Loader -->
    <script src="includes.js" defer></script>

    <!-- Translation System -->
    <script type="module" src="i18n.js"></script>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Header (Shared Component) -->
    <div id="header-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Home/Business Toggle Slider - Above Hero -->
    <div class="slider-container-wrapper">
        <div class="theme-slider">
            <div class="slider-indicator"></div>
            <span class="slider-label home active" onclick="switchContent('home')" data-i18n="nav.home">Home</span>
            <span class="slider-label business" onclick="switchContent('business')"
                data-i18n="nav.business">Business</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- HOME CONTENT -->
    <div id="home-content" class="page-content">
        <!-- Hero Section - Home -->
        <section class="home-hero">
            <div class="hero-container">
                <div class="hero-content-grid">
                    <div class="hero-text">
                        <h1 data-i18n="hero.home.title">Tech Support That Feels Like Family</h1>
                        <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="hero.home.subtitle">Your Personal IT Team</p>
                        <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="hero.home.description">No more tech stress. Get expert
                            help setting up, securing, and
                            maintaining your home technology. Clear answers, fast solutions, and peace of mind.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html" class="hero-btn"><span data-i18n="hero.home.cta">Get Started
                                Today</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="hero-image">
                        <img src="Assets/Images/hero-image.jpg" alt="Happy family using technology" data-i18n-attr="alt"
                            data-i18n="hero.home.imageAlt">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Why Choose Us - Home -->
        <section class="why-choose-home">
            <div class="why-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.title">Why Families Choose SoonTech</h2>
                <div class="benefits-grid">
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-friends"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.personal.title">Personal Touch</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.personal.description">We treat your home like our own. Friendly,
                            patient support that speaks your language.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.fast.title">Fast Response</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.fast.description">Same-day service available. We know tech issues
                            can't wait.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.secure.title">Safe & Secure</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.secure.description">Protect your family with enterprise-grade
                            security, simplified for home use.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-dollar-sign"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.pricing.title">Transparent Pricing</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.pricing.description">No hidden fees. Clear, upfront pricing you can
                            trust.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Home Services Grid -->
        <section class="home-services">
            <div class="services-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.services.title">How We Help Your Home</h2>
                <p class="section-subtitle" data-i18n="home.services.subtitle">Simple solutions for everyday tech</p>

                <div class="home-services-grid">
                    <!-- Wi-Fi Setup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-wifi"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.wifi.title">Wi-Fi Setup & Optimization</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.wifi.description">Fast, reliable internet throughout your entire
                            home. No more dead zones.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#wifi" class="service-link"><span data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn
                                More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Smart Home -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-home"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.smartHome.title">Smart Home Integration</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.smartHome.description">Connect and control your devices
                            effortlessly. Alexa, Google, and more.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#smart-home" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Security -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.security.title">Home Network Security</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.security.description">Protect your family from online threats with
                            smart security solutions.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#security" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Backup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.backup.title">Photo & File Backup</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.backup.description">Never lose precious memories. Automatic cloud
                            and local backups.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#backup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Device Setup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-laptop"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.deviceSetup.title">New Device Setup</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.deviceSetup.description">Get your new computer, tablet, or phone
                            working perfectly from day one.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#device-setup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Support -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-headset"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.support.title">24/7 Tech Support</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.support.description">Help whenever you need it. Phone, email, or
                            remote assistance.</p>
                        <a href="support.html" class="service-link"><span data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span>
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="view-all-container">
                    <a href="services-home.html" class="view-all-btn-home" data-i18n="home.services.viewAll">View All
                        Home Services</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CTA Section - Home -->
        <section class="home-cta">
            <div class="cta-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.cta.title">Ready to Simplify Your Tech Life?</h2>
                <p data-i18n="home.cta.subtitle">Get started with a free consultation</p>
                <a href="contact-us.html" class="cta-btn-large"><span data-i18n="home.cta.button">Schedule Free
                        Consultation</span> <i class="fas fa-calendar-check"></i></a>
            </div>
        </section>
    </div>

    <!-- BUSINESS CONTENT -->
    <div id="business-content" class="page-content" style="display: none;">
        <!-- Hero Section - Business handled in previous turn but ensuring it's correct -->
        <section class="business-hero">
            <div class="hero-container">
                <div class="hero-content-grid">
                    <div class="hero-text">
                        <h1 data-i18n="hero.business.title">Enterprise IT, Small Business Budget</h1>
                        <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="hero.business.subtitle">Your Competitive Edge</p>
                        <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="hero.business.description">Stop worrying about technology

    <!-- Footer (Shared Component) -->
    <div id="footer-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Content Switching Script -->
    <script>
        function switchContent(type) {
            const homeContent = document.getElementById('home-content');
            const businessContent = document.getElementById('business-content');
            const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
            const activeLabel = document.querySelector(`.slider-label.${type}`);

            if (!indicator || !activeLabel) return;

            // Add fade out effect
            const currentContent = type === 'home' ? businessContent : homeContent;
            const nextContent = type === 'home' ? homeContent : businessContent;

            // Fade out current content
            currentContent.classList.add('fade-out');

            // Wait for fade out, then switch
            setTimeout(() => {
                // Update slider appearance
                indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';

                if (type === 'home') {
                    // Show home content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'block';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'none';
                    indicator.classList.remove('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                } else {
                    // Show business content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'none';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'block';
                    indicator.classList.add('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                }

                // Store preference
                localStorage.setItem('soontech_index_view', type);

                // Remove fade out class and scroll to top
                currentContent.classList.remove('fade-out');
                nextContent.classList.remove('fade-out');

                // Smooth scroll to top
                window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
            }, 300);
        }

        // Initialize and handle resize
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const savedView = localStorage.getItem('soontech_index_view') || 'home';
            switchContent(savedView);

            // Handle resize to keep indicator aligned
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const activeLabel = document.querySelector('.slider-label.active');
                const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
                if (activeLabel && indicator) {
                    indicator.style.transition = 'none'; // Instant move on resize
                    indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                    indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';
                    // Restore transition after a tiny delay
                    setTimeout(() => indicator.style.transition = '', 50);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
</body>

</html>
          Solution

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is configured to set the Content-Security-Policy header.
      2. Sub Resource Integrity Attribute Missing (1)
        1. GET http://192.168.1.153:5173/sitemap.xml
          Alert tags
          • CWE-345
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          The integrity attribute is missing on a script or link tag served by an external server. The integrity tag prevents an attacker who have gained access to this server from injecting a malicious content.
          Request
          Request line and header section (248 bytes) 
          GET http://192.168.1.153:5173/sitemap.xml HTTP/1.1
host: 192.168.1.153:5173
user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/141.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
pragma: no-cache
cache-control: no-cache
          Request body (0 bytes)
          Response
          Status line and header section (234 bytes) 
          HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Vary: Origin
Content-Type: text/html
Cache-Control: no-cache
Etag: W/"5c69-PNioCP/oAECIlC1meeKrtkYr/vU"
Date: Wed, 04 Mar 2026 01:54:40 GMT
Connection: keep-alive
Keep-Alive: timeout=5
Content-Length: 23657

    <script type="module" src="/i18n.js"></script>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Header (Shared Component) -->

    <!-- Home/Business Toggle Slider - Above Hero -->

        <div class="theme-slider">
            <div class="slider-indicator"></div>
            <span class="slider-label home active" onclick="switchContent('home')" data-i18n="nav.home">Home</span>
            <span class="slider-label business" onclick="switchContent('business')"
                data-i18n="nav.business">Business</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- HOME CONTENT -->

                            help setting up, securing, and
                            maintaining your home technology. Clear answers, fast solutions, and peace of mind.</p>

                                Today</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>

                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-lightbulb"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.consulting.title">IT Strategy & Consulting</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.consulting.description">Technology roadmaps aligned with your
                            business goals. Strategic guidance from experts.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#consulting" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Backup -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-database"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.backup.title">Backup & Disaster Recovery</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.backup.description">Never lose critical data. Automated backups
                            and rapid recovery solutions.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#backup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="view-all-container">
                    <a href="services-business.html" class="view-all-btn-business"
                        data-i18n="business.services.viewAll">View All Business Services</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CTA Section - Business -->
        <section class="business-cta">
            <div class="cta-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.cta.title">Ready to Upgrade Your Business IT?</h2>
                <p data-i18n="business.cta.subtitle">Get a free technology assessment</p>
                <a href="contact-us.html?service=business" class="cta-btn-large"><span
                        data-i18n="business.cta.button">Get Your Free Assessment</span> <i
                        class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
            </div>
        </section>
    </div>

    <!-- Footer (Shared Component) -->
    <div id="footer-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Content Switching Script -->
    <script>
        function switchContent(type) {
            const homeContent = document.getElementById('home-content');
            const businessContent = document.getElementById('business-content');
            const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
            const activeLabel = document.querySelector(`.slider-label.${type}`);

            if (!indicator || !activeLabel) return;

            // Add fade out effect
            const currentContent = type === 'home' ? businessContent : homeContent;
            const nextContent = type === 'home' ? homeContent : businessContent;

            // Fade out current content
            currentContent.classList.add('fade-out');

            // Wait for fade out, then switch
            setTimeout(() => {
                // Update slider appearance
                indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';

                if (type === 'home') {
                    // Show home content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'block';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'none';
                    indicator.classList.remove('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                } else {
                    // Show business content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'none';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'block';
                    indicator.classList.add('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                }

                // Store preference
                localStorage.setItem('soontech_index_view', type);

                // Remove fade out class and scroll to top
                currentContent.classList.remove('fade-out');
                nextContent.classList.remove('fade-out');

                // Smooth scroll to top
                window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
            }, 300);
        }

        // Initialize and handle resize
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const savedView = localStorage.getItem('soontech_index_view') || 'home';
            switchContent(savedView);

            // Handle resize to keep indicator aligned
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const activeLabel = document.querySelector('.slider-label.active');
                const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
                if (activeLabel && indicator) {
                    indicator.style.transition = 'none'; // Instant move on resize
                    indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                    indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';
                    // Restore transition after a tiny delay
                    setTimeout(() => indicator.style.transition = '', 50);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
</body>

</html>
          Evidence 
          <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Overpass:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

          Provide a valid integrity attribute to the tag.

  2. Risk=Medium, Confidence=Medium (4)

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="portal">
  <head>
    <title>Soon-Tech Help Desk</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href=https://edge.spiceworksstatic.com/service.tron/assets/favicon-845dec177fcd19cebf907924a1da01792dae2115fe1181fb96a6c94e260d338e.ico>

    <meta name="csrf-param" content="authenticity_token" />
<meta name="csrf-token" content="K8lB4Fg9P5EujAf4ubBMY1NAZmohya66oz7rDYqVFuzM4NNKbm2GoCUKjyfKoUZAeas5sBX2O7HBFoIDbjaHrw" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="revision" content="45d168dc" />
    <!-- TODO: Remove once pages have been re-indexed and robots.txt file is added back -->
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex">

    <!-- Data Layer -->
<script>
  var userId = '';
  var chdUserId = '';
  var accountId = '';
  var currentEndUserId = '';
  var currentEndUserOrganizationId = '';
  var currentEndUserPortalAuthType = '';

  function getPortalAuthType() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;

    if (currentPath.startsWith('/portal')) {
      if (currentPath.includes('/portal/registrations')) {
        return '2'; // email authentication
      }
      if (!currentEndUserId) {
        return '1'; // guest mode (no authentication)
      }

      // will be either 2 for email authentication or 3 for active directory authentication
      return currentEndUserPortalAuthType;
    }
    // We're not in the Portal app
    else {
      return '';
    }
  }

  function initializeDataLayer() {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      'user_id': userId,
      'chd_user_id': chdUserId,
      'account_id': accountId,
      'chd_end_user_id': currentEndUserId,
      'chd_end_user_portal_auth_type': getPortalAuthType(),
      'chd_end_user_organization_id': currentEndUserOrganizationId,
    });
  }

  initializeDataLayer();
</script>
<!-- End Data Layer -->

</script>

          Parameter 
          x-frame-options
          Evidence 
          ALLOW-FROM *
          Solution

          Ensure a valid setting is used on all web pages returned by your site (if you expect the page to be framed only by pages on your server (e.g. it's part of a FRAMESET) then you'll want to use SAMEORIGIN, otherwise if you never expect the page to be framed, you should use DENY. Alternatively consider implementing Content Security Policy's "frame-ancestors" directive.

    3. https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com (1)

      1. Cross-Domain Misconfiguration (1)
        1. GET https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/5.15.4/css/all.min.css
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A01
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • OWASP_2017_A05
          • CWE-264
          Alert description

          Web browser data loading may be possible, due to a Cross Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) misconfiguration on the web server.
          Other info

          The CORS misconfiguration on the web server permits cross-domain read requests from arbitrary third party domains, using unauthenticated APIs on this domain. Web browser implementations do not permit arbitrary third parties to read the response from authenticated APIs, however. This reduces the risk somewhat. This misconfiguration could be used by an attacker to access data that is available in an unauthenticated manner, but which uses some other form of security, such as IP address white-listing.

          Evidence 
          Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
          Solution

          Ensure that sensitive data is not available in an unauthenticated manner (using IP address white-listing, for instance).

          Configure the "Access-Control-Allow-Origin" HTTP header to a more restrictive set of domains, or remove all CORS headers entirely, to allow the web browser to enforce the Same Origin Policy (SOP) in a more restrictive manner.

    4. http://192.168.1.153:5173 (1)

      1. Missing Anti-clickjacking Header (1)
        1. GET http://192.168.1.153:5173/sitemap.xml
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • CWE-1021
          • SYSTEMIC
          • WSTG-v42-CLNT-09
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          Alert description

          The response does not protect against 'ClickJacking' attacks. It should include either Content-Security-Policy with 'frame-ancestors' directive or X-Frame-Options.
          Request
          Request line and header section (248 bytes) 
          GET http://192.168.1.153:5173/sitemap.xml HTTP/1.1
host: 192.168.1.153:5173
user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/141.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
pragma: no-cache
cache-control: no-cache
          Request body (0 bytes)
          Response
          Status line and header section (234 bytes) 
          HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Vary: Origin
Content-Type: text/html
Cache-Control: no-cache
Etag: W/"5c69-PNioCP/oAECIlC1meeKrtkYr/vU"
Date: Wed, 04 Mar 2026 01:54:40 GMT
Connection: keep-alive
Keep-Alive: timeout=5
Content-Length: 23657
          Response body (23657 bytes) 
          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <script type="module" src="/@vite/client"></script>

    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description" content="SoonTech - Professional IT solutions for homes and businesses in Vancouver, BC">
    <title>SoonTech - IT & Cloud Services | Vancouver, BC</title>

    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Overpass:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

    <!-- Font Awesome -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/5.15.4/css/all.min.css">

    <!-- Main Stylesheet -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/styles.css">

    <!-- Shared Components Loader -->
    <script src="/includes.js" defer></script>

    <!-- Translation System -->
    <script type="module" src="/i18n.js"></script>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Header (Shared Component) -->
    <div id="header-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Home/Business Toggle Slider - Above Hero -->
    <div class="slider-container-wrapper">
        <div class="theme-slider">
            <div class="slider-indicator"></div>
            <span class="slider-label home active" onclick="switchContent('home')" data-i18n="nav.home">Home</span>
            <span class="slider-label business" onclick="switchContent('business')"
                data-i18n="nav.business">Business</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- HOME CONTENT -->
    <div id="home-content" class="page-content">
        <!-- Hero Section - Home -->
        <section class="home-hero">
            <div class="hero-container">
                <div class="hero-content-grid">
                    <div class="hero-text">
                        <h1 data-i18n="hero.home.title">Tech Support That Feels Like Family</h1>
                        <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="hero.home.subtitle">Your Personal IT Team</p>
                        <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="hero.home.description">No more tech stress. Get expert
                            help setting up, securing, and
                            maintaining your home technology. Clear answers, fast solutions, and peace of mind.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html" class="hero-btn"><span data-i18n="hero.home.cta">Get Started
                                Today</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="hero-image">
                        <img src="/Assets/Images/hero-image.jpg" alt="Happy family using technology" data-i18n-attr="alt"
                            data-i18n="hero.home.imageAlt">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Why Choose Us - Home -->
        <section class="why-choose-home">
            <div class="why-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.title">Why Families Choose SoonTech</h2>
                <div class="benefits-grid">
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-friends"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.personal.title">Personal Touch</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.personal.description">We treat your home like our own. Friendly,
                            patient support that speaks your language.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.fast.title">Fast Response</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.fast.description">Same-day service available. We know tech issues
                            can't wait.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.secure.title">Safe & Secure</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.secure.description">Protect your family with enterprise-grade
                            security, simplified for home use.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-dollar-sign"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.pricing.title">Transparent Pricing</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.pricing.description">No hidden fees. Clear, upfront pricing you can
                            trust.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Home Services Grid -->
        <section class="home-services">
            <div class="services-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.services.title">How We Help Your Home</h2>
                <p class="section-subtitle" data-i18n="home.services.subtitle">Simple solutions for everyday tech</p>

                <div class="home-services-grid">
                    <!-- Wi-Fi Setup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-wifi"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.wifi.title">Wi-Fi Setup & Optimization</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.wifi.description">Fast, reliable internet throughout your entire
                            home. No more dead zones.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#wifi" class="service-link"><span data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn
                                More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Smart Home -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-home"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.smartHome.title">Smart Home Integration</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.smartHome.description">Connect and control your devices
                            effortlessly. Alexa, Google, and more.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#smart-home" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Security -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.security.title">Home Network Security</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.security.description">Protect your family from online threats with
                            smart security solutions.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#security" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Backup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.backup.title">Photo & File Backup</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.backup.description">Never lose precious memories. Automatic cloud
                            and local backups.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#backup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Device Setup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-laptop"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.deviceSetup.title">New Device Setup</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.deviceSetup.description">Get your new computer, tablet, or phone
                            working perfectly from day one.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#device-setup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Support -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-headset"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.support.title">24/7 Tech Support</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.support.description">Help whenever you need it. Phone, email, or
                            remote assistance.</p>
                        <a href="support.html" class="service-link"><span data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span>
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="view-all-container">
                    <a href="services-home.html" class="view-all-btn-home" data-i18n="home.services.viewAll">View All
                        Home Services</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CTA Section - Home -->
        <section class="home-cta">
            <div class="cta-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.cta.title">Ready to Simplify Your Tech Life?</h2>
                <p data-i18n="home.cta.subtitle">Get started with a free consultation</p>
                <a href="contact-us.html" class="cta-btn-large"><span data-i18n="home.cta.button">Schedule Free
                        Consultation</span> <i class="fas fa-calendar-check"></i></a>
            </div>
        </section>
    </div>

    <!-- BUSINESS CONTENT -->
    <div id="business-content" class="page-content" style="display: none;">
        <!-- Hero Section - Business handled in previous turn but ensuring it's correct -->
        <section class="business-hero">
            <div class="hero-container">
                <div class="hero-content-grid">
                    <div class="hero-text">
                        <h1 data-i18n="hero.business.title">Enterprise IT, Small Business Budget</h1>
                        <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="hero.business.subtitle">Your Competitive Edge</p>
                        <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="hero.business.description">Stop worrying about technology
                            and focus on growth. Get reliable IT
                            support, robust security, and strategic guidance tailored to your business.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html" class="hero-btn"><span data-i18n="hero.business.cta">Boost Your
                                Business</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="hero-image">
                        <img src="/Assets/Images/business.jpg" alt="Professional business team" data-i18n-attr="alt"
                            data-i18n="hero.business.imageAlt">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Why Choose Us - Business -->
        <section class="why-choose-business">
            <div class="why-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.title">Why Businesses Choose SoonTech</h2>
                <div class="benefits-grid">
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.reliable.title">Always Reliable</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.reliable.description">99.9% uptime guaranteed. Your business
                            never stops, and neither do we.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-users"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.expert.title">Expert Team</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.expert.description">Certified professionals with decades of
                            combined experience in enterprise IT.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.scalable.title">Grows With You</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.scalable.description">Solutions that scale from startup to
                            enterprise. Flexible and future-proof.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-hand-holding-usd"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.cost.title">Cost-Effective</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.cost.description">Enterprise-grade IT at small business prices.
                            No hidden fees or surprises.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Business Services Grid -->
        <section class="business-services">
            <div class="services-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.services.title">How We Power Your Business</h2>
                <p class="section-subtitle" data-i18n="business.services.subtitle">Professional IT solutions that drive
                    growth</p>

                <div class="business-services-grid">
                    <!-- Managed IT -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-headset"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.managedIT.title">Managed IT Services</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.managedIT.description">Complete IT management, monitoring, and
                            support. Focus on your business, we'll handle the tech.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#managed-it" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Cloud -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-cloud"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.cloud.title">Cloud & Microsoft 365</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.cloud.description">Seamless migration and management. Work from
                            anywhere with confidence.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#cloud" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Network -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-network-wired"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.network.title">Network Infrastructure</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.network.description">Fast, secure, reliable networks. Built for
                            performance and scalability.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#network" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Cybersecurity -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-user-shield"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.cybersecurity.title">Cybersecurity Solutions</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.cybersecurity.description">Protect your business from threats.
                            Comprehensive security that works 24/7.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#cybersecurity" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Strategy -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-lightbulb"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.consulting.title">IT Strategy & Consulting</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.consulting.description">Technology roadmaps aligned with your
                            business goals. Strategic guidance from experts.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#consulting" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Backup -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-database"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.backup.title">Backup & Disaster Recovery</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.backup.description">Never lose critical data. Automated backups
                            and rapid recovery solutions.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#backup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="view-all-container">
                    <a href="services-business.html" class="view-all-btn-business"
                        data-i18n="business.services.viewAll">View All Business Services</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CTA Section - Business -->
        <section class="business-cta">
            <div class="cta-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.cta.title">Ready to Upgrade Your Business IT?</h2>
                <p data-i18n="business.cta.subtitle">Get a free technology assessment</p>
                <a href="contact-us.html?service=business" class="cta-btn-large"><span
                        data-i18n="business.cta.button">Get Your Free Assessment</span> <i
                        class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
            </div>
        </section>
    </div>

    <!-- Footer (Shared Component) -->
    <div id="footer-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Content Switching Script -->
    <script>
        function switchContent(type) {
            const homeContent = document.getElementById('home-content');
            const businessContent = document.getElementById('business-content');
            const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
            const activeLabel = document.querySelector(`.slider-label.${type}`);

            if (!indicator || !activeLabel) return;

            // Add fade out effect
            const currentContent = type === 'home' ? businessContent : homeContent;
            const nextContent = type === 'home' ? homeContent : businessContent;

            // Fade out current content
            currentContent.classList.add('fade-out');

            // Wait for fade out, then switch
            setTimeout(() => {
                // Update slider appearance
                indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';

                if (type === 'home') {
                    // Show home content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'block';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'none';
                    indicator.classList.remove('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                } else {
                    // Show business content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'none';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'block';
                    indicator.classList.add('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                }

                // Store preference
                localStorage.setItem('soontech_index_view', type);

                // Remove fade out class and scroll to top
                currentContent.classList.remove('fade-out');
                nextContent.classList.remove('fade-out');

                // Smooth scroll to top
                window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
            }, 300);
        }

        // Initialize and handle resize
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const savedView = localStorage.getItem('soontech_index_view') || 'home';
            switchContent(savedView);

            // Handle resize to keep indicator aligned
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const activeLabel = document.querySelector('.slider-label.active');
                const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
                if (activeLabel && indicator) {
                    indicator.style.transition = 'none'; // Instant move on resize
                    indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                    indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';
                    // Restore transition after a tiny delay
                    setTimeout(() => indicator.style.transition = '', 50);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
</body>

</html>
          Parameter 
          x-frame-options
          Solution

          Modern Web browsers support the Content-Security-Policy and X-Frame-Options HTTP headers. Ensure one of them is set on all web pages returned by your site/app.

          If you expect the page to be framed only by pages on your server (e.g. it's part of a FRAMESET) then you'll want to use SAMEORIGIN, otherwise if you never expect the page to be framed, you should use DENY. Alternatively consider implementing Content Security Policy's "frame-ancestors" directive.

  3. Risk=Low, Confidence=High (3)

    1. https://www.google.com (2)

      1. CSP: Notices (1)
        1. GET https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api2/anchor?ar=1&k=6LdKJK8ZAAAAAPouGI6FOJepbMiheg-nAz1OF1Tb&co=aHR0cHM6Ly9zb29uLXRlY2gub24uc3BpY2V3b3Jrcy5jb206NDQz&hl=en&v=AWtrSI7lAmTAfV1rzWqEqz54&size=invisible&anchor-ms=20000&execute-ms=30000&cb=yp41a7a5l3m1
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          Content Security Policy (CSP) is an added layer of security that helps to detect and mitigate certain types of attacks. Including (but not limited to) Cross Site Scripting (XSS), and data injection attacks. These attacks are used for everything from data theft to site defacement or distribution of malware. CSP provides a set of standard HTTP headers that allow website owners to declare approved sources of content that browsers should be allowed to load on that page вҖ” covered types are JavaScript, CSS, HTML frames, fonts, images and embeddable objects such as Java applets, ActiveX, audio and video files.
          Other info

          Warnings:

          The report-uri directive has been deprecated in favor of the new report-to directive

          Parameter 
          Content-Security-Policy
          Evidence 
          script-src 'nonce-BcGGsXIgbTngbBa0P2vrxA' 'unsafe-inline' 'strict-dynamic' https: http: 'unsafe-eval';object-src 'none';base-uri 'self';report-uri https://csp.withgoogle.com/csp/recaptcha/1
          Solution

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is properly configured to set the Content-Security-Policy header.
      2. Server Leaks Version Information via "Server" HTTP Response Header Field (1)
        1. POST https://www.google.com/ccm/collect?frm=0&ae=g&en=page_view&dl=https%3A%2F%2Fsoon-tech.on.spiceworks.com%2Fportal&scrsrc=www.googletagmanager.com&rnd=2078652.1772589934&dt=Soon-Tech%20Help%20Desk&auid=1244461649.1772589934&navt=n&npa=0&ep.ads_data_redaction=0&gtm=45He6330h2v6833490za200zd6833490xea&gcd=13l3l3l3l1l1&dma=0&tag_exp=103116026~103200004~115616986~115938466~115938468~116024733~117484252&apve=1&apvf=f&apvc=1&tft=1772589934143&tfd=3898
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • WSTG-v42-INFO-02
          • CWE-497
          Alert description

          The web/application server is leaking version information via the "Server" HTTP response header. Access to such information may facilitate attackers identifying other vulnerabilities your web/application server is subject to.
          Request
          Request line and header section (896 bytes) 
          POST https://www.google.com/ccm/collect?frm=0&ae=g&en=page_view&dl=https%3A%2F%2Fsoon-tech.on.spiceworks.com%2Fportal&scrsrc=www.googletagmanager.com&rnd=2078652.1772589934&dt=Soon-Tech%20Help%20Desk&auid=1244461649.1772589934&navt=n&npa=0&ep.ads_data_redaction=0&gtm=45He6330h2v6833490za200zd6833490xea&gcd=13l3l3l3l1l1&dma=0&tag_exp=103116026~103200004~115616986~115938466~115938468~116024733~117484252&apve=1&apvf=f&apvc=1&tft=1772589934143&tfd=3898 HTTP/1.1

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is configured to suppress the "Server" header or provide generic details.

          Alert tags

          Alert description

          HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) is a web security policy mechanism whereby a web server declares that complying user agents (such as a web browser) are to interact with it using only secure HTTPS connections (i.e. HTTP layered over TLS/SSL). HSTS is an IETF standards track protocol and is specified in RFC 6797.

ВҜГҹSВҳГҚDВӮE97VГӢГҺГёГӨdГұГғdВӨГҖ,Вғ^nГҝВң1ВҹГҘГҡГ”ГҢГЁ&Г§В“Вӣ/oВҗ%Г…9PВ’ГҗВ”ГғГӣГұВҝВҗ/В¬Г•kГҚГҪВЈ-ГӢВӯeГ·В©В¶[Гә(ВҙГҠГЈY7ГүВўВҒoГӮ%VN}ВҺQ&#ГҘhВ”rВ”HVВҚDГүQhjYВқВ¶3Г“Гү"AВҮГқLГӨГҲ-T5Г—В»Г§ГұГҙcГҹВһZГ®Г”В“\ГӢuГҷВ•ВҺ8ГіГҷГЁВһГ–pFВҳВ„ГҙГј/В’Г»Г”ВҘГ«iВјz4VГӯnSГЈ'ГҺ+В—В®WВ‘ГңГ§.=ГҸ%5ГҺГ„ГөВҢPГ—hВ®;ГӣdВҪВӢГЎВҮ{AjГӣГ…gГЈГҸВҶВҡГҮГ§AГү/ГҪГ»ГәВҒГҪВҒtВҜ%T8ГҝГҺ<ГЁГҖВҺВ«ВҹГ Гў>$ГЈ*~BГ“ГҰВҸsГәВ№_ГҒГқВӯsВұВҺГҙГ·iВӯPj'В°2ГӢwsГҺГҡВ•ГҹГӨwГ«Гё<ВҡГ¶Г‘$ГЈfL\ГңВ¬<ГҝВ·ГЁГҒsВ¶&Г‘ГҫВҢВңSВӘВҲВөВҮ$ГҮ^GNГҶU<ГҝГўГҷ	В»~ВөВқВәC_9ВңВ§ГҘВҪВіВҚВөsxГҘh1ВҸВҜВӨВҺГӣГӯГәUГӣTГӯhВҺ6cГҸNВ¬ГҜВҗВ№ODВЁВ¬ВӢГ…В¬0ГјГЈГә9-1QГҰВӨГЈZГ“YВҡГ¬ГңГ«ВңВңВӘГ ВӘВһ}Гҫ|bГҲГһ3В“В»В…Вө{Г°ГӯvВҙ3Г№AГӣВ№F{В…#ВҚiВ„Г‘ГҝГӮeH>Г·ГҺВ¶Г—[ГӮ:xs7]$NГј%Г“t|<ВҡFRВҙ19ГҮ;	ГёГҡГ•%1kKRsВүГЈГү|ГЎГҖГ®Г«ubГ—Гҗ7ВЎГҝ]ГӣГӢГҮ4oГ•wГ©iВӮВЎГғsjГ–{%:&ВҺВҜГ·Г§{kВ§ГҸГ¶OВ—Гӣ␀Г¶В„ВіГәГҸ5ГӯВҖВ»Вқ<}6ГҰkkВүГЈГқГӣВ»В”}В·GgГҹZГ¬ГҺ}<ВЎГ§Гғp^_VKEezGВіВҢГўВҗ(/ГіВ’ВҘВӘВҗВў CГҲ.ВөВғГё.ВЎГӨ]ГҹГҹ=ГғВҷГӮВҲ#ВІfГЈГқГ§ВӘГҫГәOВІg_В§Г«ГҫГёГіВ§В¶В”В¶wГ•>#AВ»$ГҹВ s)Q:,7]В’ВӮГү#DWВӨВҰsВӨГ ВҝГҡГІUВҫhВұTГҶГ®.ГҚВҲ`ВҲ(m,~FГЈ@*ВҸГ—Ce7gjВ»-В…8Г»ГёВ·B?Г«VJГҳВүГЁВ¬-В‘sГҰYVГҶcВЎ`ВҠ9ГҶLГӮГҮГ«TXВЈВҷ/mГ‘}В—В‘ВҜBSГіВё)В„L6ВҶ^|:ГҺ5] WEГ¶$Вң+В·*ВҸ&ВҖГҖГЎ[4`ГҝГҳГҫ$7zВҝВ’FГЈkВӢpВ”ГёВ’@

          Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is configured to enforce Strict-Transport-Security.

          Response body (9397 bytes) 
          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="portal">
  <head>
    <title>Soon-Tech Help Desk</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href=https://edge.spiceworksstatic.com/service.tron/assets/favicon-845dec177fcd19cebf907924a1da01792dae2115fe1181fb96a6c94e260d338e.ico>

    <meta name="csrf-param" content="authenticity_token" />
<meta name="csrf-token" content="K8lB4Fg9P5EujAf4ubBMY1NAZmohya66oz7rDYqVFuzM4NNKbm2GoCUKjyfKoUZAeas5sBX2O7HBFoIDbjaHrw" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="revision" content="45d168dc" />
    <!-- TODO: Remove once pages have been re-indexed and robots.txt file is added back -->
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex">

    <!-- Data Layer -->
<script>
  var userId = '';
  var chdUserId = '';
  var accountId = '';
  var currentEndUserId = '';
  var currentEndUserOrganizationId = '';
  var currentEndUserPortalAuthType = '';

  function getPortalAuthType() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;

    if (currentPath.startsWith('/portal')) {
      if (currentPath.includes('/portal/registrations')) {
        return '2'; // email authentication
      }
      if (!currentEndUserId) {
        return '1'; // guest mode (no authentication)
      }

      // will be either 2 for email authentication or 3 for active directory authentication
      return currentEndUserPortalAuthType;
    }
    // We're not in the Portal app
    else {
      return '';
    }
  }

  function initializeDataLayer() {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      'user_id': userId,
      'chd_user_id': chdUserId,
      'account_id': accountId,
      'chd_end_user_id': currentEndUserId,
      'chd_end_user_portal_auth_type': getPortalAuthType(),
      'chd_end_user_organization_id': currentEndUserOrganizationId,
    });
  }

  initializeDataLayer();
</script>
<!-- End Data Layer -->

<!-- Google Tag Manager -->
<script>(function(w,d,s,l,i){w[l]=w[l]||[];w[l].push({'gtm.start':
new Date().getTime(),event:'gtm.js'});var f=d.getElementsByTagName(s)[0],
j=d.createElement(s),dl=l!='dataLayer'?'&l='+l:'';j.async=true;j.src=
'https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtm.js?id='+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);
})(window,document,'script','dataLayer','GTM-KTKRL68F');</script>
<!-- End Google Tag Manager -->

<!-- Google Tag Manager -->
<script>(function(w,d,s,l,i){w[l]=w[l]||[];w[l].push({'gtm.start':
new Date().getTime(),event:'gtm.js'});var f=d.getElementsByTagName(s)[0],
j=d.createElement(s),dl=l!='dataLayer'?'&l='+l:'';j.async=true;j.src=
'https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtm.js?id='+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f);
})(window,document,'script','dataLayer','GTM-KKTNBB');</script>
<!-- End Google Tag Manager -->
    <script>
  (function(i,s,o,g,r,a,m){i['GoogleAnalyticsObject']=r;i[r]=i[r]||function(){
  (i[r].q=i[r].q||[]).push(arguments)},i[r].l=1*new Date();a=s.createElement(o),
  m=s.getElementsByTagName(o)[0];a.async=1;a.src=g;m.parentNode.insertBefore(a,m)
  })(window,document,'script','//www.google-analytics.com/analytics.js','ga');

  ga('create', 'UA-314222-33', 'auto', {'allowLinker': true});
  // current_user is undefined for the portal and will not send pageviews.
  // Ember and Vue use a different method for sending GA stats. Check out stats.js
</script>

    <script>
