          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <script type="module" src="/@vite/client"></script>

    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Contact Us - SoonTech</title>
    <meta name="description"
        content="Get in touch with SoonTech for IT solutions, cloud services, and tech support. We respond within 24 hours.">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Overpass:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">
    <link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/5.15.4/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="includes.js" defer></script>
    <script type="module" src="i18n.js"></script>
    <!-- EmailJS SDK -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@emailjs/browser@4/dist/email.min.js"></script>
    <script type="module" src="js/contact.js"></script>
</head>

<body>

    <!-- Header Section -->
    <div id="header-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Contact Section -->
    <section class="contact-section">
        <div class="contact-wrapper">
            <!-- Left Column: Contact Information -->
            <div class="contact-info-panel">
                <h1 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.title">Let's Start a Conversation</h1>
                <p class="info-subtitle" data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.subtitle">Have a question or need assistance?
                    We're here to help you succeed with the
                    right technology solutions.</p>

                <!-- Contact Details -->
                <div class="contact-details">
                    <div class="contact-item">
                        <div class="contact-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-phone-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-text">
                            <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.phone">Phone</h3>
                            <p><a href="tel:+17788624365">+1 (778) 862-4365</a></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="contact-item">
                        <div class="contact-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-text">
                            <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.email">Email</h3>
                            <p><a href="mailto:info@soon-tech.com">info@soon-tech.com</a></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="contact-item">
                        <div class="contact-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-text">
                            <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.hours.title">Business Hours</h3>
                            <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.hours.weekday">Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM</p>
                            <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.hours.saturday">Saturday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM</p>
                            <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.hours.sunday">Sunday: Closed</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="contact-item">
                        <div class="contact-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-text">
                            <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.location">Location</h3>
                            <p>18222 70 Avenue</p>
                            <p>Surrey, BC</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Trust Signal -->
                <div class="trust-signal">
                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                    <div class="trust-text">
                        <h4 data-i18n="contactUsPage.trust.title">Quick Response Guarantee</h4>
                        <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.trust.subtitle">We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right Column: Contact Form -->
            <div class="contact-form-panel">
                <h2 data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.title">Send Us a Message</h2>
                <p class="form-subtitle" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.subtitle">Fill out the form below and we'll get
                    back to you as soon as possible.</p>

                <form id="contactForm" class="contact-form">
                    <!-- Name Input -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="name"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.name.label">Full Name</span> <span
                                class="required">*</span></label>
                        <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="John Doe" data-i18n-attr="placeholder"
                            data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.name.placeholder" required>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Email Input -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="email"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.email.label">Email Address</span> <span
                                class="required">*</span></label>
                        <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="john@example.com"
                            data-i18n-attr="placeholder" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.email.placeholder" required>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Phone Input -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="phone"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.phone.label">Phone Number</span> <span
                                class="required">*</span></label>
                        <input type="tel" id="phone" name="phone" placeholder="+1 (778) 862-4365"
                            data-i18n-attr="placeholder" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.phone.placeholder" required>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Service Type Dropdown -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="service-type"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.label">Service
                                Interest</span> <span class="required">*</span></label>
                        <select id="service-type" name="service-type" required>
                            <option value="" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.placeholder">-- Select a Service --
                            </option>

                            <optgroup label="Home Services" data-i18n-attr="label"
                                data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.groups.home">
                                <option value="home-quick-setup"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.homeQuick">Quick Setup & Support
                                </option>
                                <option value="home-smart-security"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.homeSmart">Smart Home Security
                                </option>
                                <option value="home-easy-backup"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.homeBackup">Easy Backup Solutions
                                </option>
                                <option value="home-digital-wellness"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.homeWellness">Digital Wellness
                                </option>
                            </optgroup>

                            <optgroup label="Business Services" data-i18n-attr="label"
                                data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.groups.business">
                                <option value="business-managed-it"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.businessManaged">Managed IT Services
                                </option>
                                <option value="business-cloud-solutions"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.businessCloud">Cloud Solutions
                                </option>
                                <option value="business-cybersecurity"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.businessCyber">Cybersecurity</option>
                                <option value="business-it-strategy"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.businessStrategy">IT Strategy &
                                    Consulting</option>
                            </optgroup>

                            <optgroup label="Other" data-i18n-attr="label"
                                data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.groups.other">
                                <option value="other-general"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.otherGeneral">General Inquiry</option>
                                <option value="other-support"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.otherSupport">Technical Support
                                </option>
                            </optgroup>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Message Textarea -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="message"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.message.label">Message</span> <span
                                class="required">*</span></label>
                        <textarea id="message" name="message" rows="6" placeholder="Tell us how we can help you..."
                            data-i18n-attr="placeholder" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.message.placeholder"
                            required></textarea>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Submit Button -->
                    <button type="submit" class="btn-submit">
                        <i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i>
                        <span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.submit">Send Message</span>
                    </button>
                </form>

                <!-- Success Message (Hidden by default) -->
                <div id="success-message" class="success-message hidden">
                    <div class="success-icon">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.success.title">Thank You!</h3>
                    <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.success.message">Your message has been sent successfully. We'll get back
                        to you within 24 hours.</p>
                    <button id="send-another" class="btn-secondary" data-i18n="contactUsPage.success.another">Send
                        Another Message</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Footer Section -->
    <div id="footer-placeholder"></div>

</body>

</html>
          Parameter 
          https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@emailjs/browser@4/dist/email.min.js
          Evidence 
          <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@emailjs/browser@4/dist/email.min.js"></script>
          Solution

          Ensure JavaScript source files are loaded from only trusted sources, and the sources can't be controlled by end users of the application.
      2. X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing (1)
        1. GET http://192.168.1.153:5173/
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          Alert description

          The Anti-MIME-Sniffing header X-Content-Type-Options was not set to 'nosniff'. This allows older versions of Internet Explorer and Chrome to perform MIME-sniffing on the response body, potentially causing the response body to be interpreted and displayed as a content type other than the declared content type. Current (early 2014) and legacy versions of Firefox will use the declared content type (if one is set), rather than performing MIME-sniffing.
          Other info

          This issue still applies to error type pages (401, 403, 500, etc.) as those pages are often still affected by injection issues, in which case there is still concern for browsers sniffing pages away from their actual content type.

          At "High" threshold this scan rule will not alert on client or server error responses.
          Request
          Request line and header section (237 bytes) 
          GET http://192.168.1.153:5173/ HTTP/1.1
host: 192.168.1.153:5173
user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/141.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
pragma: no-cache
cache-control: no-cache
          Request body (0 bytes)
          Response
          Status line and header section (234 bytes) 
          HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Vary: Origin
Content-Type: text/html
Cache-Control: no-cache
Etag: W/"5c64-D/LJgMO1BJNQtiW8IEuouKdj0Q8"

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <script type="module" src="/@vite/client"></script>

    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description" content="SoonTech - Professional IT solutions for homes and businesses in Vancouver, BC">
    <title>SoonTech - IT & Cloud Services | Vancouver, BC</title>

    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Overpass:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

    <!-- Font Awesome -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/5.15.4/css/all.min.css">

    <!-- Main Stylesheet -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">

    <!-- Shared Components Loader -->
    <script src="includes.js" defer></script>

    <!-- Translation System -->
    <script type="module" src="i18n.js"></script>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Header (Shared Component) -->
    <div id="header-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Home/Business Toggle Slider - Above Hero -->
    <div class="slider-container-wrapper">
        <div class="theme-slider">
            <div class="slider-indicator"></div>
            <span class="slider-label home active" onclick="switchContent('home')" data-i18n="nav.home">Home</span>
            <span class="slider-label business" onclick="switchContent('business')"
                data-i18n="nav.business">Business</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- HOME CONTENT -->
    <div id="home-content" class="page-content">
        <!-- Hero Section - Home -->
        <section class="home-hero">
            <div class="hero-container">
                <div class="hero-content-grid">
                    <div class="hero-text">
                        <h1 data-i18n="hero.home.title">Tech Support That Feels Like Family</h1>
                        <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="hero.home.subtitle">Your Personal IT Team</p>
                        <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="hero.home.description">No more tech stress. Get expert
                            help setting up, securing, and
                            maintaining your home technology. Clear answers, fast solutions, and peace of mind.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html" class="hero-btn"><span data-i18n="hero.home.cta">Get Started
                                Today</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="hero-image">
                        <img src="Assets/Images/hero-image.jpg" alt="Happy family using technology" data-i18n-attr="alt"
                            data-i18n="hero.home.imageAlt">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Why Choose Us - Home -->
        <section class="why-choose-home">
            <div class="why-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.title">Why Families Choose SoonTech</h2>
                <div class="benefits-grid">
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-friends"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.personal.title">Personal Touch</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.personal.description">We treat your home like our own. Friendly,
                            patient support that speaks your language.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.fast.title">Fast Response</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.fast.description">Same-day service available. We know tech issues
                            can't wait.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.secure.title">Safe & Secure</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.secure.description">Protect your family with enterprise-grade
                            security, simplified for home use.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-dollar-sign"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.pricing.title">Transparent Pricing</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.pricing.description">No hidden fees. Clear, upfront pricing you can
                            trust.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Home Services Grid -->
        <section class="home-services">
            <div class="services-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.services.title">How We Help Your Home</h2>
                <p class="section-subtitle" data-i18n="home.services.subtitle">Simple solutions for everyday tech</p>

                <div class="home-services-grid">
                    <!-- Wi-Fi Setup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-wifi"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.wifi.title">Wi-Fi Setup & Optimization</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.wifi.description">Fast, reliable internet throughout your entire
                            home. No more dead zones.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#wifi" class="service-link"><span data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn
                                More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Smart Home -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-home"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.smartHome.title">Smart Home Integration</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.smartHome.description">Connect and control your devices
                            effortlessly. Alexa, Google, and more.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#smart-home" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Security -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.security.title">Home Network Security</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.security.description">Protect your family from online threats with
                            smart security solutions.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#security" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Backup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.backup.title">Photo & File Backup</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.backup.description">Never lose precious memories. Automatic cloud
                            and local backups.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#backup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Device Setup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-laptop"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.deviceSetup.title">New Device Setup</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.deviceSetup.description">Get your new computer, tablet, or phone
                            working perfectly from day one.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#device-setup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Support -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-headset"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.support.title">24/7 Tech Support</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.support.description">Help whenever you need it. Phone, email, or
                            remote assistance.</p>
                        <a href="support.html" class="service-link"><span data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span>
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="view-all-container">
                    <a href="services-home.html" class="view-all-btn-home" data-i18n="home.services.viewAll">View All
                        Home Services</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CTA Section - Home -->
        <section class="home-cta">
            <div class="cta-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.cta.title">Ready to Simplify Your Tech Life?</h2>
                <p data-i18n="home.cta.subtitle">Get started with a free consultation</p>
                <a href="contact-us.html" class="cta-btn-large"><span data-i18n="home.cta.button">Schedule Free
                        Consultation</span> <i class="fas fa-calendar-check"></i></a>
            </div>
        </section>
    </div>

    <!-- BUSINESS CONTENT -->
    <div id="business-content" class="page-content" style="display: none;">
        <!-- Hero Section - Business handled in previous turn but ensuring it's correct -->
        <section class="business-hero">
            <div class="hero-container">
                <div class="hero-content-grid">
                    <div class="hero-text">
                        <h1 data-i18n="hero.business.title">Enterprise IT, Small Business Budget</h1>
                        <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="hero.business.subtitle">Your Competitive Edge</p>
                        <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="hero.business.description">Stop worrying about technology
                            and focus on growth. Get reliable IT
                            support, robust security, and strategic guidance tailored to your business.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html" class="hero-btn"><span data-i18n="hero.business.cta">Boost Your
                                Business</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="hero-image">
                        <img src="Assets/Images/business.jpg" alt="Professional business team" data-i18n-attr="alt"
                            data-i18n="hero.business.imageAlt">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Why Choose Us - Business -->
        <section class="why-choose-business">
            <div class="why-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.title">Why Businesses Choose SoonTech</h2>
                <div class="benefits-grid">
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.reliable.title">Always Reliable</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.reliable.description">99.9% uptime guaranteed. Your business
                            never stops, and neither do we.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-users"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.expert.title">Expert Team</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.expert.description">Certified professionals with decades of
                            combined experience in enterprise IT.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.scalable.title">Grows With You</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.scalable.description">Solutions that scale from startup to
                            enterprise. Flexible and future-proof.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-hand-holding-usd"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.cost.title">Cost-Effective</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.cost.description">Enterprise-grade IT at small business prices.
                            No hidden fees or surprises.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Business Services Grid -->
        <section class="business-services">
            <div class="services-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.services.title">How We Power Your Business</h2>
                <p class="section-subtitle" data-i18n="business.services.subtitle">Professional IT solutions that drive
                    growth</p>

                <div class="business-services-grid">
                    <!-- Managed IT -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-headset"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.managedIT.title">Managed IT Services</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.managedIT.description">Complete IT management, monitoring, and
                            support. Focus on your business, we'll handle the tech.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#managed-it" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Cloud -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-cloud"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.cloud.title">Cloud & Microsoft 365</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.cloud.description">Seamless migration and management. Work from
                            anywhere with confidence.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#cloud" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Network -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-network-wired"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.network.title">Network Infrastructure</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.network.description">Fast, secure, reliable networks. Built for
                            performance and scalability.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#network" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Cybersecurity -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-user-shield"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.cybersecurity.title">Cybersecurity Solutions</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.cybersecurity.description">Protect your business from threats.
                            Comprehensive security that works 24/7.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#cybersecurity" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Strategy -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-lightbulb"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.consulting.title">IT Strategy & Consulting</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.consulting.description">Technology roadmaps aligned with your
                            business goals. Strategic guidance from experts.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#consulting" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Backup -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-database"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.backup.title">Backup & Disaster Recovery</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.backup.description">Never lose critical data. Automated backups
                            and rapid recovery solutions.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#backup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="view-all-container">
                    <a href="services-business.html" class="view-all-btn-business"
                        data-i18n="business.services.viewAll">View All Business Services</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CTA Section - Business -->
        <section class="business-cta">
            <div class="cta-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.cta.title">Ready to Upgrade Your Business IT?</h2>
                <p data-i18n="business.cta.subtitle">Get a free technology assessment</p>
                <a href="contact-us.html?service=business" class="cta-btn-large"><span
                        data-i18n="business.cta.button">Get Your Free Assessment</span> <i
                        class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
            </div>
        </section>
    </div>

    <!-- Footer (Shared Component) -->
    <div id="footer-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Content Switching Script -->
    <script>
        function switchContent(type) {
            const homeContent = document.getElementById('home-content');
            const businessContent = document.getElementById('business-content');
            const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
            const activeLabel = document.querySelector(`.slider-label.${type}`);

            if (!indicator || !activeLabel) return;

            // Add fade out effect
            const currentContent = type === 'home' ? businessContent : homeContent;
            const nextContent = type === 'home' ? homeContent : businessContent;

            // Fade out current content
            currentContent.classList.add('fade-out');

            // Wait for fade out, then switch
            setTimeout(() => {
                // Update slider appearance
                indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';

                if (type === 'home') {
                    // Show home content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'block';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'none';
                    indicator.classList.remove('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                } else {
                    // Show business content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'none';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'block';
                    indicator.classList.add('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                }

                // Store preference
                localStorage.setItem('soontech_index_view', type);

                // Remove fade out class and scroll to top
                currentContent.classList.remove('fade-out');
                nextContent.classList.remove('fade-out');

                // Smooth scroll to top
                window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
            }, 300);
        }

        // Initialize and handle resize
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const savedView = localStorage.getItem('soontech_index_view') || 'home';
            switchContent(savedView);

            // Handle resize to keep indicator aligned
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const activeLabel = document.querySelector('.slider-label.active');
                const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
                if (activeLabel && indicator) {
                    indicator.style.transition = 'none'; // Instant move on resize
                    indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                    indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';
                    // Restore transition after a tiny delay
                    setTimeout(() => indicator.style.transition = '', 50);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
</body>

</html>
          Parameter 
          x-content-type-options
          Solution

          Ensure that the application/web server sets the Content-Type header appropriately, and that it sets the X-Content-Type-Options header to 'nosniff' for all web pages.

          If possible, ensure that the end user uses a standards-compliant and modern web browser that does not perform MIME-sniffing at all, or that can be directed by the web application/web server to not perform MIME-sniffing.

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <script type="module" src="/@vite/client"></script>

    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description" content="SoonTech - Professional IT solutions for homes and businesses in Vancouver, BC">
    <title>SoonTech - IT & Cloud Services | Vancouver, BC</title>

    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Overpass:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

    <!-- Font Awesome -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/5.15.4/css/all.min.css">

    <!-- Main Stylesheet -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">

    <!-- Shared Components Loader -->
    <script src="includes.js" defer></script>

    <!-- Translation System -->
    <script type="module" src="i18n.js"></script>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Header (Shared Component) -->
    <div id="header-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Home/Business Toggle Slider - Above Hero -->
    <div class="slider-container-wrapper">
        <div class="theme-slider">
            <div class="slider-indicator"></div>
            <span class="slider-label home active" onclick="switchContent('home')" data-i18n="nav.home">Home</span>
            <span class="slider-label business" onclick="switchContent('business')"
                data-i18n="nav.business">Business</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- HOME CONTENT -->
    <div id="home-content" class="page-content">
        <!-- Hero Section - Home -->
        <section class="home-hero">
            <div class="hero-container">
                <div class="hero-content-grid">
                    <div class="hero-text">
                        <h1 data-i18n="hero.home.title">Tech Support That Feels Like Family</h1>
                        <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="hero.home.subtitle">Your Personal IT Team</p>
                        <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="hero.home.description">No more tech stress. Get expert
                            help setting up, securing, and
                            maintaining your home technology. Clear answers, fast solutions, and peace of mind.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html" class="hero-btn"><span data-i18n="hero.home.cta">Get Started
                                Today</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="hero-image">
                        <img src="Assets/Images/hero-image.jpg" alt="Happy family using technology" data-i18n-attr="alt"
                            data-i18n="hero.home.imageAlt">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Why Choose Us - Home -->
        <section class="why-choose-home">
            <div class="why-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.title">Why Families Choose SoonTech</h2>
                <div class="benefits-grid">
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-friends"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.personal.title">Personal Touch</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.personal.description">We treat your home like our own. Friendly,
                            patient support that speaks your language.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.fast.title">Fast Response</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.fast.description">Same-day service available. We know tech issues
                            can't wait.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.secure.title">Safe & Secure</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.secure.description">Protect your family with enterprise-grade
                            security, simplified for home use.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-dollar-sign"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.whyChoose.pricing.title">Transparent Pricing</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.whyChoose.pricing.description">No hidden fees. Clear, upfront pricing you can
                            trust.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Home Services Grid -->
        <section class="home-services">
            <div class="services-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.services.title">How We Help Your Home</h2>
                <p class="section-subtitle" data-i18n="home.services.subtitle">Simple solutions for everyday tech</p>

                <div class="home-services-grid">
                    <!-- Wi-Fi Setup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-wifi"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.wifi.title">Wi-Fi Setup & Optimization</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.wifi.description">Fast, reliable internet throughout your entire
                            home. No more dead zones.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#wifi" class="service-link"><span data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn
                                More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Smart Home -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-home"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.smartHome.title">Smart Home Integration</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.smartHome.description">Connect and control your devices
                            effortlessly. Alexa, Google, and more.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#smart-home" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Security -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.security.title">Home Network Security</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.security.description">Protect your family from online threats with
                            smart security solutions.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#security" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Backup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.backup.title">Photo & File Backup</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.backup.description">Never lose precious memories. Automatic cloud
                            and local backups.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#backup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Device Setup -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-laptop"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.deviceSetup.title">New Device Setup</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.deviceSetup.description">Get your new computer, tablet, or phone
                            working perfectly from day one.</p>
                        <a href="services-home.html#device-setup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Support -->
                    <div class="home-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-headset"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="home.services.support.title">24/7 Tech Support</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="home.services.support.description">Help whenever you need it. Phone, email, or
                            remote assistance.</p>
                        <a href="support.html" class="service-link"><span data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span>
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="view-all-container">
                    <a href="services-home.html" class="view-all-btn-home" data-i18n="home.services.viewAll">View All
                        Home Services</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CTA Section - Home -->
        <section class="home-cta">
            <div class="cta-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="home.cta.title">Ready to Simplify Your Tech Life?</h2>
                <p data-i18n="home.cta.subtitle">Get started with a free consultation</p>
                <a href="contact-us.html" class="cta-btn-large"><span data-i18n="home.cta.button">Schedule Free
                        Consultation</span> <i class="fas fa-calendar-check"></i></a>
            </div>
        </section>
    </div>

    <!-- BUSINESS CONTENT -->
    <div id="business-content" class="page-content" style="display: none;">
        <!-- Hero Section - Business handled in previous turn but ensuring it's correct -->
        <section class="business-hero">
            <div class="hero-container">
                <div class="hero-content-grid">
                    <div class="hero-text">
                        <h1 data-i18n="hero.business.title">Enterprise IT, Small Business Budget</h1>
                        <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="hero.business.subtitle">Your Competitive Edge</p>
                        <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="hero.business.description">Stop worrying about technology
                            and focus on growth. Get reliable IT
                            support, robust security, and strategic guidance tailored to your business.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html" class="hero-btn"><span data-i18n="hero.business.cta">Boost Your
                                Business</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="hero-image">
                        <img src="Assets/Images/business.jpg" alt="Professional business team" data-i18n-attr="alt"
                            data-i18n="hero.business.imageAlt">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Why Choose Us - Business -->
        <section class="why-choose-business">
            <div class="why-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.title">Why Businesses Choose SoonTech</h2>
                <div class="benefits-grid">
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.reliable.title">Always Reliable</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.reliable.description">99.9% uptime guaranteed. Your business
                            never stops, and neither do we.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-users"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.expert.title">Expert Team</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.expert.description">Certified professionals with decades of
                            combined experience in enterprise IT.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.scalable.title">Grows With You</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.scalable.description">Solutions that scale from startup to
                            enterprise. Flexible and future-proof.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="benefit-card">
                        <i class="fas fa-hand-holding-usd"></i>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.whyChoose.cost.title">Cost-Effective</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.whyChoose.cost.description">Enterprise-grade IT at small business prices.
                            No hidden fees or surprises.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Business Services Grid -->
        <section class="business-services">
            <div class="services-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.services.title">How We Power Your Business</h2>
                <p class="section-subtitle" data-i18n="business.services.subtitle">Professional IT solutions that drive
                    growth</p>

                <div class="business-services-grid">
                    <!-- Managed IT -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-headset"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.managedIT.title">Managed IT Services</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.managedIT.description">Complete IT management, monitoring, and
                            support. Focus on your business, we'll handle the tech.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#managed-it" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Cloud -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-cloud"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.cloud.title">Cloud & Microsoft 365</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.cloud.description">Seamless migration and management. Work from
                            anywhere with confidence.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#cloud" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Network -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-network-wired"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.network.title">Network Infrastructure</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.network.description">Fast, secure, reliable networks. Built for
                            performance and scalability.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#network" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Cybersecurity -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-user-shield"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.cybersecurity.title">Cybersecurity Solutions</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.cybersecurity.description">Protect your business from threats.
                            Comprehensive security that works 24/7.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#cybersecurity" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Strategy -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-lightbulb"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.consulting.title">IT Strategy & Consulting</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.consulting.description">Technology roadmaps aligned with your
                            business goals. Strategic guidance from experts.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#consulting" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Backup -->
                    <div class="business-service-card">
                        <div class="service-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-database"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="business.services.backup.title">Backup & Disaster Recovery</h3>
                        <p data-i18n="business.services.backup.description">Never lose critical data. Automated backups
                            and rapid recovery solutions.</p>
                        <a href="services-business.html#backup" class="service-link"><span
                                data-i18n="common.learnMore">Learn More</span> <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="view-all-container">
                    <a href="services-business.html" class="view-all-btn-business"
                        data-i18n="business.services.viewAll">View All Business Services</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CTA Section - Business -->
        <section class="business-cta">
            <div class="cta-container">
                <h2 data-i18n="business.cta.title">Ready to Upgrade Your Business IT?</h2>
                <p data-i18n="business.cta.subtitle">Get a free technology assessment</p>
                <a href="contact-us.html?service=business" class="cta-btn-large"><span
                        data-i18n="business.cta.button">Get Your Free Assessment</span> <i
                        class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i></a>
            </div>
        </section>
    </div>

    <!-- Footer (Shared Component) -->
    <div id="footer-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Content Switching Script -->
    <script>
        function switchContent(type) {
            const homeContent = document.getElementById('home-content');
            const businessContent = document.getElementById('business-content');
            const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
            const activeLabel = document.querySelector(`.slider-label.${type}`);

            if (!indicator || !activeLabel) return;

            // Add fade out effect
            const currentContent = type === 'home' ? businessContent : homeContent;
            const nextContent = type === 'home' ? homeContent : businessContent;

            // Fade out current content
            currentContent.classList.add('fade-out');

            // Wait for fade out, then switch
            setTimeout(() => {
                // Update slider appearance
                indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';

                if (type === 'home') {
                    // Show home content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'block';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'none';
                    indicator.classList.remove('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                } else {
                    // Show business content
                    homeContent.style.display = 'none';
                    businessContent.style.display = 'block';
                    indicator.classList.add('business-active');

                    // Update labels active state
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.home').forEach(label => label.classList.remove('active'));
                    document.querySelectorAll('.slider-label.business').forEach(label => label.classList.add('active'));
                }

                // Store preference
                localStorage.setItem('soontech_index_view', type);

                // Remove fade out class and scroll to top
                currentContent.classList.remove('fade-out');
                nextContent.classList.remove('fade-out');

                // Smooth scroll to top
                window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
            }, 300);
        }

        // Initialize and handle resize
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const savedView = localStorage.getItem('soontech_index_view') || 'home';
            switchContent(savedView);

            // Handle resize to keep indicator aligned
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const activeLabel = document.querySelector('.slider-label.active');
                const indicator = document.querySelector('.slider-indicator');
                if (activeLabel && indicator) {
                    indicator.style.transition = 'none'; // Instant move on resize
                    indicator.style.left = activeLabel.offsetLeft + 'px';
                    indicator.style.width = activeLabel.offsetWidth + 'px';
                    // Restore transition after a tiny delay
                    setTimeout(() => indicator.style.transition = '', 50);
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
</body>

</html>

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="portal">
  <head>
    <title>Soon-Tech Help Desk</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href=https://edge.spiceworksstatic.com/service.tron/assets/favicon-845dec177fcd19cebf907924a1da01792dae2115fe1181fb96a6c94e260d338e.ico>

    <meta name="csrf-param" content="authenticity_token" />
<meta name="csrf-token" content="K8lB4Fg9P5EujAf4ubBMY1NAZmohya66oz7rDYqVFuzM4NNKbm2GoCUKjyfKoUZAeas5sBX2O7HBFoIDbjaHrw" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="revision" content="45d168dc" />
    <!-- TODO: Remove once pages have been re-indexed and robots.txt file is added back -->
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex">

    <!-- Data Layer -->
<script>
  var userId = '';
  var chdUserId = '';
  var accountId = '';
  var currentEndUserId = '';
  var currentEndUserOrganizationId = '';
  var currentEndUserPortalAuthType = '';

  function getPortalAuthType() {
    const currentPath = window.location.pathname;

    if (currentPath.startsWith('/portal')) {
      if (currentPath.includes('/portal/registrations')) {
        return '2'; // email authentication
      }
      if (!currentEndUserId) {
        return '1'; // guest mode (no authentication)
      }

      // will be either 2 for email authentication or 3 for active directory authentication
      return currentEndUserPortalAuthType;
    }
    // We're not in the Portal app
    else {
      return '';
    }
  }

  function initializeDataLayer() {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      'user_id': userId,
      'chd_user_id': chdUserId,
      'account_id': accountId,
      'chd_end_user_id': currentEndUserId,
      'chd_end_user_portal_auth_type': getPortalAuthType(),
      'chd_end_user_organization_id': currentEndUserOrganizationId,
    });
  }

  initializeDataLayer();
</script>
<!-- End Data Layer -->

          Solution

          This is an informational alert rather than a vulnerability and so there is nothing to fix.

    2. https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com (1)

      1. Retrieved from Cache (1)
        1. GET https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/5.15.4/css/all.min.css
          Alert tags
          • WSTG-v42-ATHN-06
          • CWE-525
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          Alert description

          The content was retrieved from a shared cache. If the response data is sensitive, personal or user-specific, this may result in sensitive information being leaked. In some cases, this may even result in a user gaining complete control of the session of another user, depending on the configuration of the caching components in use in their environment. This is primarily an issue where caching servers such as "proxy" caches are configured on the local network. This configuration is typically found in corporate or educational environments, for instance.
          Other info

          The presence of the 'Age' header indicates that a HTTP/1.1 compliant caching server is in use.

          Evidence 
          Age: 1181728
          Solution

          Validate that the response does not contain sensitive, personal or user-specific information. If it does, consider the use of the following HTTP response headers, to limit, or prevent the content being stored and retrieved from the cache by another user:

          Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate, private

          Pragma: no-cache

          Expires: 0

          This configuration directs both HTTP 1.0 and HTTP 1.1 compliant caching servers to not store the response, and to not retrieve the response (without validation) from the cache, in response to a similar request.

    3. http://192.168.1.153:5173 (3)

      1. Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in URL (1)
        1. GET http://192.168.1.153:5173/contact-us.html?email=zaproxy%40example.com&message=Zaproxy+alias+impedit+expedita+quisquam+pariatur+exercitationem.+Nemo+rerum+eveniet+dolores+rem+quia+dignissimos.&name=ZAP&phone=9999999999&service-type=home-quick-setup

          • CWE-598
          • OWASP_2021_A01
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =

          • OWASP_2017_A03

          Alert description

          The request appeared to contain sensitive information leaked in the URL. This can violate PCI and most organizational compliance policies. You can configure the list of strings for this check to add or remove values specific to your environment.
          Other info

          The URL contains email address(es).

          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <script type="module" src="/@vite/client"></script>

    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Contact Us - SoonTech</title>
    <meta name="description"
        content="Get in touch with SoonTech for IT solutions, cloud services, and tech support. We respond within 24 hours.">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Overpass:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">
    <link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/5.15.4/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="includes.js" defer></script>
    <script type="module" src="i18n.js"></script>
    <!-- EmailJS SDK -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@emailjs/browser@4/dist/email.min.js"></script>
    <script type="module" src="js/contact.js"></script>
</head>

<body>

    <!-- Header Section -->
    <div id="header-placeholder"></div>

    <!-- Contact Section -->
    <section class="contact-section">
        <div class="contact-wrapper">
            <!-- Left Column: Contact Information -->
            <div class="contact-info-panel">
                <h1 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.title">Let's Start a Conversation</h1>
                <p class="info-subtitle" data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.subtitle">Have a question or need assistance?
                    We're here to help you succeed with the
                    right technology solutions.</p>

                <!-- Contact Details -->
                <div class="contact-details">
                    <div class="contact-item">
                        <div class="contact-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-phone-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-text">
                            <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.phone">Phone</h3>
                            <p><a href="tel:+17788624365">+1 (778) 862-4365</a></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="contact-item">
                        <div class="contact-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-text">
                            <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.email">Email</h3>
                            <p><a href="mailto:info@soon-tech.com">info@soon-tech.com</a></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="contact-item">
                        <div class="contact-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-text">
                            <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.hours.title">Business Hours</h3>
                            <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.hours.weekday">Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM</p>
                            <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.hours.saturday">Saturday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM</p>
                            <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.hours.sunday">Sunday: Closed</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="contact-item">
                        <div class="contact-icon">
                            <i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="contact-text">
                            <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.info.location">Location</h3>
                            <p>18222 70 Avenue</p>
                            <p>Surrey, BC</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Trust Signal -->
                <div class="trust-signal">
                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                    <div class="trust-text">
                        <h4 data-i18n="contactUsPage.trust.title">Quick Response Guarantee</h4>
                        <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.trust.subtitle">We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right Column: Contact Form -->
            <div class="contact-form-panel">
                <h2 data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.title">Send Us a Message</h2>
                <p class="form-subtitle" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.subtitle">Fill out the form below and we'll get
                    back to you as soon as possible.</p>

                <form id="contactForm" class="contact-form">
                    <!-- Name Input -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="name"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.name.label">Full Name</span> <span
                                class="required">*</span></label>
                        <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="John Doe" data-i18n-attr="placeholder"
                            data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.name.placeholder" required>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Email Input -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="email"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.email.label">Email Address</span> <span
                                class="required">*</span></label>
                        <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="john@example.com"
                            data-i18n-attr="placeholder" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.email.placeholder" required>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Phone Input -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="phone"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.phone.label">Phone Number</span> <span
                                class="required">*</span></label>
                        <input type="tel" id="phone" name="phone" placeholder="+1 (778) 862-4365"
                            data-i18n-attr="placeholder" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.phone.placeholder" required>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Service Type Dropdown -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="service-type"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.label">Service
                                Interest</span> <span class="required">*</span></label>
                        <select id="service-type" name="service-type" required>
                            <option value="" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.placeholder">-- Select a Service --
                            </option>

                            <optgroup label="Home Services" data-i18n-attr="label"
                                data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.groups.home">
                                <option value="home-quick-setup"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.homeQuick">Quick Setup & Support
                                </option>
                                <option value="home-smart-security"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.homeSmart">Smart Home Security
                                </option>
                                <option value="home-easy-backup"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.homeBackup">Easy Backup Solutions
                                </option>
                                <option value="home-digital-wellness"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.homeWellness">Digital Wellness
                                </option>
                            </optgroup>

                            <optgroup label="Business Services" data-i18n-attr="label"
                                data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.groups.business">
                                <option value="business-managed-it"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.businessManaged">Managed IT Services
                                </option>
                                <option value="business-cloud-solutions"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.businessCloud">Cloud Solutions
                                </option>
                                <option value="business-cybersecurity"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.businessCyber">Cybersecurity</option>
                                <option value="business-it-strategy"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.businessStrategy">IT Strategy &
                                    Consulting</option>
                            </optgroup>

                            <optgroup label="Other" data-i18n-attr="label"
                                data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.groups.other">
                                <option value="other-general"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.otherGeneral">General Inquiry</option>
                                <option value="other-support"
                                    data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.service.options.otherSupport">Technical Support
                                </option>
                            </optgroup>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Message Textarea -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="message"><span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.message.label">Message</span> <span
                                class="required">*</span></label>
                        <textarea id="message" name="message" rows="6" placeholder="Tell us how we can help you..."
                            data-i18n-attr="placeholder" data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.message.placeholder"
                            required></textarea>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Submit Button -->
                    <button type="submit" class="btn-submit">
                        <i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i>
                        <span data-i18n="contactUsPage.form.submit">Send Message</span>
                    </button>
                </form>

                <!-- Success Message (Hidden by default) -->
                <div id="success-message" class="success-message hidden">
                    <div class="success-icon">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 data-i18n="contactUsPage.success.title">Thank You!</h3>
                    <p data-i18n="contactUsPage.success.message">Your message has been sent successfully. We'll get back
                        to you within 24 hours.</p>
                    <button id="send-another" class="btn-secondary" data-i18n="contactUsPage.success.another">Send
                        Another Message</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Footer Section -->
    <div id="footer-placeholder"></div>

</body>

</html>
